exact_quote: To measure performance on generating scientific protocols, we use an LLM to convert a natural language protocol into pseudocode, and then evaluate an LLM’s ability to reconstruct the pseudocode from a high-level description and a list of admissible pseudocode functions.
uncertainty: automated evaluation is distinct from scientist review and laboratory execution

exact_quote: Original protocols and generated ground-truth pseudocode were assessed line-by-line by a competent laboratory scientist.
uncertainty: competence is reported but an independence design is not

exact_quote: We validated the first protocol by implementing it in the lab with the instructions and parameter values provided by the model. The protocol ran successfully: the cells remained viable after storage at -80 °C, as evidenced by subsequent culture on nutrient agar.
uncertainty: one successful human-run protocol is not a recurring autonomous physical loop
